description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold, intricate pattern of orange gears and cogs on a black background, giving it a striking, mechanical-inspired look. The shoe has a white, robust sole with deep treads for traction, and white overlays that form a cage-like structure along the sides, providing both support and visual contrast. The lacing system is traditional, with white laces threaded through multiple eyelets that extend up to the ankle, ensuring a secure fit. The toe box, sides, and heel are all covered in the same patterned material, while the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The heel counter and toe cap are reinforced, likely for durability and protection during urban activities. The overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic leather or textile for the upper, rubber for the sole, and foam padding for comfort.
description: A high-top sneaker with a vivid orange gear pattern on black, white overlays, and a sturdy white sole with deep treads. Features include a padded collar, reinforced heel, and traditional white laces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange gear pattern, white overlays, and the full profile of the white sole with deep treads.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, padded tongue, and the symmetrical gear pattern on the toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the patterned upper, white structural overlays, and the curve of the sole.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the padded collar, reinforced heel, and the continuation of the gear pattern wrapping around the back.
